name: Cove Aurelio
description: A charming beach retreat set among dramatic natural rock formations along the Linao coastline. Known for its paluto service — bring your fresh catch from the market and have it cooked right at the beach. Offers cottages for day use, ideal for family outings and group celebrations.
bookingNote: Contact the Tourism Council to arrange visits and cottage reservations.

name: Balai Azinan
description: The largest resort in Calatrava, Balai Azinan offers a complete beach experience. Features a swimming pool, beachfront cottages, and fully equipped function rooms — ideal for group events, family reunions, and overnight stays. The resort's wide beachfront is perfect for both relaxation and celebrations.
bookingNote: Contact the Tourism Council for current rates and availability.

name: Bulawan Farm Resort
description: A nature-immersed farm resort tucked in the hills of Pagsangahan. Bulawan offers a peaceful escape from the coast, surrounded by lush farm landscapes. Perfect for visitors seeking a quieter, countryside experience alongside Calatrava's natural scenery.
bookingNote: Contact the Tourism Council for directions and current rates.

name: Calatrava Inn
description: Nestled in the heart of the municipality, Calatrava Inn offers travelers a cozy and welcoming home away from home with convenient access to the town's pristine natural wonders.

name: Liralari Guest House
description: Liralari Guesthouse provides a cozy and budget-friendly sanctuary for travelers, blending warm local hospitality with a peaceful atmosphere that serves as the perfect base for exploring Calatrava's pristine beaches and hidden waterfalls.
